blended.narrative: Sugarbush is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 6,629 ft. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

Tuesday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
